overview: Team Apex Gaming (TAG) is a premium esports team website with a dark, futuristic aesthetic. Features a hero section, player roster, match results, video highlights, and team story — all styled with orange glow effects and glassmorphism card design.
features: Transparent sticky navbar with mobile hamburger menu
Full-viewport hero with glow headline and CTA button
Responsive player roster grid with hover glow effects
Match results cards with Win/Loss badges
YouTube highlights grid with video thumbnails
Team About section with orange accent styling
Social media footer with fan disclaimer
Fully responsive mobile and desktop layout
Smooth scroll animations with Intersection Observer
